description: Golden task dataset for evaluating the multi-agent pipeline (FASE C+D). Tests handoff quality, evidence preservation, critic usefulness, and final answer improvement over single-agent runs.

entries.query: Explain the architecture of GroundedOS Lab
entries.notes: Full four-agent pipeline must execute. Each handoff should carry forward accumulated evidence.

entries.query: What observability features does the system have?
entries.notes: Evidence collected by ResearcherAgent must be visible in the final MultiAgentTrace.

entries.query: What are the limitations of the current agent implementation?
entries.notes: CriticAgent must produce a structured critique with gaps and improvement suggestions.

entries.query: Describe the safety guardrails in detail
entries.notes: Multi-agent answer should be more complete than a single DocumentQAAgent answer on the same query.

entries.query: How does the RAG retrieval pipeline work?
entries.notes: With devMode=true the MultiAgentTrace must include the full dev mode trace (sanitized).

entries.query: What tools are available in the agent tool registry?
entries.notes: Every handoff must contain the required protocol fields for auditability and replay.

handoff_quality.description: Fraction of handoffs that contain all required protocol fields

evidence_preservation.description: Fraction of tasks where evidence collected by ResearcherAgent appears in final trace

critic_usefulness.description: Fraction of tasks where CriticAgent identifies at least one gap or issue

final_answer_improvement.description: Fraction of tasks where multi-agent answer scores higher on groundedness than single-agent

pipeline_completion_rate.description: Fraction of tasks where all four agents execute successfully
